name: Documentation Improvement
about: Propose updates or corrections to markdown guides, integrations guides, or READMEs
title: "[DOCS] Improve [Guide Name]"
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## 📝 Proposed Documentation Changes

### 1. Target Document
- **File Path**: (e.g. `docs/mcp.md`, `README.md`)

### 2. Description of the issue
*What is incorrect, outdated, or missing in the current document?*

### 3. Suggested Revision
*Provide the updated text block or modifications:*
```markdown
- [Original text]
+ [Updated text]
```
